diff: The Launch Agent 6 Foundation is the Prime Foundation associated with Launch Agent 6. Its mandate is to support the development, growth, and adoption of Launch Agent 6.
summary: Add Development Company To Launch Agent 6 Artifact
description: Adds Stablewatch as the development company and Launch Agent 6 Foundation as the foundation for Launch Agent 6.
